name: Airbrush Root Touch-Up Spray (Multi-Color)
description: Instantly cover greys and roots or revive highlights between appointments. Microfine pigments blend seamlessly with your natural shade when—and where—you need it. The quick-drying powder formula also absorbs dirt and oil to refresh hair.

name: AirStyle Flexible Finish Cream
description: Soft, flexible texture and a moisturizing satin finish: Our whipped-crème confection is an elegant shortcut to next-day hair and subdued frizz, with separation that can be reworked.

name: Après Beach Wave and Shine Spray
description: Attention island-hoppers and champagne-poppers: Get beach-to-bombshell hair—tousled, touchable waves with sun-kissed shine—without the salty stiffness. Our moisturizing glamour spray uses rich extracts and exotic oils for lush repair and sultry texture.

name: Bright Blonde Conditioner
description: Restore brightness and shine to blonde hair. This deeply nourishing violet conditioner corrects brassiness and yellow tones while imparting strength, softness and sheen for hair that is truly enlightened.

name: Bright Blonde Essential Priming Serum
description: An essential first step when caring for blonde hair. Specially formulated with violet and pearlized pigments, our brightening serum tones and eliminates brassiness while replenishing moisture and protecting up to 450°F. Hair is left restored, touchably soft and lit from within.

name: Bright Blonde Radiance & Repair Treatment
description: Stay bright with our restorative silkening treatment specially formulated for blondes. This lightweight concentrate repairs and prevents damage, brittleness and split ends leaving hair ultra-soft while violet pigments tone to keep brassiness at bay.

name: Bright Blonde Shampoo
description: Immediately illuminate blonde and silver hair. This revitalizing violet shampoo corrects brassiness and yellow tones while brightening natural highlights for hair that is healthier, shinier, lit from within.

name: Bright Blonde Sun Lightening Mist
description: Extend your vacation and gradually lighten your blonde hues with the heat of the sun (or your dryer). Our peroxide-free spray is formulated with a natural blend of lemon and chamomile to illuminate highlights while imparting weightless moisture and UV protection. It’s beach hair, but better.

name: Cleansing Creme for Moisture & Control
description: Cleanse without getting into a lather. This non-foaming conditioning formula is rich in purifying oils, citrus fruit extracts and refreshing water-mint essence to gently clean strands and energize the scalp while protecting color, calming frizz and restoring moisture. The result: complete silky softness, no tangles. For all hair types - especially curly, coily and textured.

name: Conditioner for Beautiful Color
description: This rich, restorative conditioner extends the life of your dye while soothing over-processed, color-treated hair (you know who you are). Enhanced environmental protection keeps color-sapping UV rays at bay.

name: Conditioner for Brilliance & Shine
description: A fortifying and polishing conditioner that magnifies shine and detangles hair with its weightless formula.

name: Conditioner for Magnificent Volume
description: Because you should always think big. This body-building gel-cream moisturizer provides uplifting support for effortless combing, styling, glamorizing.

name: Crème for Style
description: Superior style and substantial shine are a quarter-size dollop away. This stylists’ staple offers firm yet flexible all-day hold and tames frizz with rich moisturizers. Loves curly and straight hair equally.

name: Curl Control Silkening Crème
description: Offering the perfect balance of hold and moisture, this silk-light crème glides through hair to style and nourish with ultra-hydrating avocado, apricot and coconut oils. Curls and waves are given instant, touchable definition, with all-day frizz-control and support. For those who want to hydrate and control their curls. Curl Types: 2-3.

name: Curl Gelée for Shine & Definition
description: This silky, hydrating curl jelly defines, shapes and styles, making coils more manageable. Macadamia, neem and apricot oils moisturize and detangle strands. The result: ultra-shiny, smooth, defined curls. For those who want to hydrate and define their curls and coils. Curl Types: 3-4.

name: Curl Gloss Hydration & Hold
description: Curl without crunch. This lightweight glossing gel shapes and shines for ultra-hydrating control. A blend of Brazilian extracts, including passion flower, jicama and cupuacu fight humidity and deeply condition for soft yet defined curls that hold all day. For those with curly hair who want glossy shine and hold. Curl Types: 2-3.

name: Curl Shaping Mousse
description: This call to curls locks in locks while leaving them supple and shiny—never stiff. Sealed-in moisture and hydrating frizz resistance are the light-as-air pièce de résistance. For those with curly hair looking for definition, body and bounce. Curl Types: 2-3.

name: Dry Texturizing Spray
description: Bigger, better, full-on glamorous hair. This invisible dry hair spray builds in incredible volume and sultry texture. Zeolite crystallines absorb oil at the roots, leaving you with just-styled hair for days (and nights).

name: Featherbalm Weightless Styler
description: Style, shine and weightless control. Specially developed for finer hair textures, this ultra-light balm smoothes and hydrates while imparting a hint of hold to blowouts, air-dried textures and finished styles that need a little polish.

name: Fiber Groom Elastic Texture Paste
description: This new-age fiber paste fuses silken strands with next-generation polymers to create an airy blend of bounce, separation, and elastic hold.

name: Flash Form Finishing Spray Wax
description: Create weightless, buildable texture with control and lasting hold. This ultra-fine wax mist adds style, separation and sheen to short cuts and long lengths.

name: Free Styler Working Hairspray
description: The stylist's tool of choice, this ultra-fine, ultra-dry mist can be layered, styled, and reworked to perfection. Spray over finished looks for light, brushable hold with a touchable, satin finish.

name: Gel Sérum Radiance, Magic and Hold
description: Forget what you know about gel. This magical, gold-flecked potion with active moisturizing agents brings sophisticated hold with shine rather than stiffness. Gorgeous.

name: Glaze for Beautiful Color
description: For those who want to refresh their hair color and add glossy shine.

name: Gold Lust Balm d'Or Heat Styling Shield
description: Shield your hair from thermal damage. This superlight styler with heat-activated polymer technology and healing cassis and sandalwood oils protects and nourishes fragile strands, sealing in sleekness and radiant shine while you blow-dry, straighten or curl.

name: Gold Lust Dry Shampoo
description: Instantly clean. Extend your blowout and prevent damage with our transformative dry shampoo. Absorbs product buildup, oil, and impurities with translucent powders while soothing scalp and restoring strength and softness. Fragrance-retention technology means our signature scent stays with you all day.

name: Gold Lust Heat Protection Spray
description: Protect your hair from hot tools while repairing it to its softest, healthiest prime. This multi-tasking, dry conditioning spray repairs, nourishes and shields damaged strands up to 450°F / 232°C. Hair is instantly silky soft with a frizz-free finish.

name: Gold Lust Imperial Blowout Transformative Styling Creme
description: Our transformative blowout crème, formulated with skincare technology, creates a full, flawless, iconic Oribe blowout that lasts for days while styling in strength, density, softness and shine. This ultra-nourishing formula smoothes away signs of damage and aging for hair that looks and feels healthier and younger after just one use.

name: Gold Lust Nourishing Hair Oil
description: This luxuriously light oil absorbs instantly to restore hair to its prime. Infused with a rich blend of jasmine, edelweiss flower, lychee, sandalwood, cassis and argan extracts, each protective drop penetrates the hair to deeply condition, strengthen and smooth – imparting intense nourishment and incredible shine. Works wonders on dry, damaged and color-treated hair…Liquid gold.

name: Gold Lust Repair & Restore Conditioner
description: Discover the fountain of youth for soft, shiny, ageless hair. Blending time-honored oils and extracts – cypress and argan – with our revolutionary bio-restorative complex, this ultra-hydrating conditioner softens and revitalizes, smoothing each cuticle to undo the damage of time (and style).

name: Gold Lust Repair & Restore Shampoo
description: Reawaken your hair to its glossiest, healthiest prime. This rejuvenating cleanser combines centuries-old healing oils and extracts—cypress and argan—with our revolutionary bio-restorative complex to balance the scalp and reinforce the inner strength of each strand.

name: Gold Lust Restorative Night Creme
description: A restorative night crème for your hair. Powerful biomimetic lupine flower peptides and revitalizing eucalyptus extract harmonize in this leave-in nightly ritual to deeply repair and restore the hair while enveloping the senses in a soothing, tranquil aura. Hair is transformed into ultra-soft, silky locks with a youthful shine. Awaken to hair that is revitalized with every dawn.

name: Gold Lust Transformative Masque
description: This truly modern remedy penetrates to rebuild each fiber with curative white tea, baobab, jasmine and our bio-restorative complex, improving elasticity and fortifying hair to rediscover its softness, body and inner brilliance. Restore overworked hair to its prime with each dose.

name: Grandiose Hair Plumping Mousse
description: Each luxe pouf gives hair an exaggerated sense of body and structure, without the slightest hint of crunch. All-day memory leaves styles supremely soft yet set, for hair that's thicker, fuller, larger than life.

name: Hair Alchemy Fortifying Treatment Serum
description: Discover hair’s ultimate strength. This treatment elixir combines our curative blend of chia seed, bio-fermented bamboo leaf and plant-based protein with phytoceramides and cotton seed extract to shield and fortify fragile strands. The sheer, fast-absorbing serum creates a protective veil around each hair fiber to improve tensile strength and elasticity while preventing breakage by strengthening from within to encourage length. Imagine invincible hair.

name: Hair Alchemy Heatless Styling Balm
description: Style au naturel. This lightweight balm, formulated for fine-to-medium strands, defines heatless styles and air-dried waves alike. Our Curative Blend strengthens fragile hair while fermented yerba mate extract adds a healthy, glossy shine. Hair is left fortified, frizz-free, and touchably soft.

name: Hair Alchemy Resilience Conditioner
description: Give hair a dose of strength, softness and vitality with this indulgently conditioning hair therapy. Our curative blend of chia seed, bio-fermented bamboo leaf and plant-based protein create a protective shield around strands to improve hair’s structural integrity and prevent breakage. A multi-action hyaluronic acid complex rehydrates from within to deliver a surge of moisture and increase elasticity. The result: smooth, strong, ultra-resilient hair.

name: Hair Alchemy Shampoo
description: Build strength from within. For fragile, weak hair

name: Hair Alchemy Strengthening Masque
description: This buttery soft treatment masque replenishes and strengthens fragile strands. Intense hydration restores elasticity to brittle locks which helps prevent breakage, allowing hair to grow longer. Moisture-magnifying shea butter and yacón root quench and nourish weak hair, while our Curative Blend goes deep within the cortex to strengthen strands from the inside out. Recharge with the ultimate treatment for longer and stronger hair.

name: Imperméable Anti-Humidity Spray
description: This anti-humidity finishing spray shields hair from frizz on the sultriest of days (and nights), protecting sleek blowouts and perfect curls alike. Miami-tested.

name: Intense Conditioner for Moisture & Control
description: This deeper-than-deep conditioner instantly and intensely treats curly, coily and thick locks for damage repair and effortless detangling. Hair becomes ultra-soft, ultra-silky and smoother than ever. Now that's intense. For those with thick or curly hair textures.

name: Invisible Defense Universal Protection Spray
description: Your daily dose of universal protection. This weightless mist shields hair from thermal damage up to 450°F, UV rays and pollution while imparting gentle moisture. Say goodbye to dryness, color fading, and frizz.

name: Level 1 - Cool Black
description: Deepest, most saturated shade. No visible warmth. Reflects minimal light. Rich, dramatic, and bold.

name: Level 1 - Neutral Black
description: Deepest, most saturated shade. No visible warmth. Reflects minimal light. Rich, dramatic, and bold.

name: Level 10 – Lightest Blonde
description: Very light blonde that still has a hint of warmth. Often used as a base for platinum or pearl tones.

name: Level 11 – Platinum Blonde
description: The palest, most icy blonde. Nearly white with little to no warmth. Requires high lift and maintenance.

name: Level 2 – Darkest Brown
description: Almost black but slightly softer. Still very deep with subtle brown tones in natural light.

name: Level 3 – Dark Brown
description: Rich espresso or chocolate brown. Adds strong depth and contrast.

name: Level 3 + Level 10 Highlights and Level 7 Lowlights
description: A rich, dark brunette base with soft platinum blonde highlights and medium blonde lowlights for contrast. This creates a dramatic, high-impact dimensional look with brightness and depth.

name: Level 3 + Level 9 Cool Highlights
description: Dark brown base paired with cool, soft light blonde highlights. These highlights add brightness while keeping the overall tone ashier and more refined—ideal for clients who prefer cooler, deeper contrast without warmth.

name: Level 4 – Medium Brown
description: Classic brunette—balanced and soft. Can appear slightly warm or cool depending on the natural undertone.

name: Level 5 – Light Brown
description: Soft brown with visible warmth or neutrality. A lighter brunette shade before transitioning into dark blondes.

name: Level 6 – Dark Blonde / Bronde
description: Sits between brown and blonde. A dimensional, natural-looking blonde with depth.

name: Level 6 + Level 8
description: Light brown blended with medium blonde. Offers a natural, sun-kissed look—neither too light nor too dark—perfect for low-maintenance lived-in color.

name: Level 7G – Medium Golden Blonde
description: True blonde. Can appear golden, beige, or ashy depending on the tone.

name: Level 8 – Light Blonde
description: Bright, luminous blonde. Often seen in highlight work and sun-kissed looks.

name: Level 8A – Light Ash Blonde
description: A cool, muted blonde with smoky undertones. Designed to counteract warmth and brassiness, 8A is ideal for those wanting an icy, silvery finish without going full platinum.

name: Level 8G – Light Golden Blonde
description: A warm, radiant blonde with golden undertones. Think honey, sunshine, and soft golden shimmer. This shade adds brightness and a healthy glow, especially flattering on warm or olive skin tones.

name: Level 8N – Light Neutral Blonde
description: A balanced, soft blonde that’s neither too warm nor too cool. It’s a true “middle-of-the-road” blonde—perfect for clients who want a natural-looking tone without any golden or ashy reflection.

name: Level 9 + Level 7 Lowlights
description: Very light blonde with deeper medium blonde lowlights woven throughout. Adds softness and dimension, giving a more natural blonde feel and preventing it from looking too flat or over-processed.

name: Level 9 – Very Light Blonde
description: Soft, pale blonde. Starts to look icy or creamy, depending on the overall tone.

name: Level 9b
description: Need description

name: Masque for Beautiful Color
description: Add life and shine to your hair with the latest color-maintenance technology. Intense, cuticle-enriching conditioning, color-protecting UV filters and next-generation frizz-taming bio-polymers supercharge this color-enhancing, glossifying masque.

name: Matte Waves Texture Lotion
description: Get salt-spray waves, sans dryness. This medium-hold lotion coaxes matte-textured pieciness out of even the finest hair, adding grip to styles and a beachy allure.

name: Maximista Thickening Spray
description: Bigger is better. This thermal-protective body-builder helps you expand to your absolute fullest with enduring lift and hold.

name: Moisture & Control Deep Treatment Masque
description: Treat your curls right. Our ultimate moisturizing masque, with coconut and almond oils, quenches thirsty curls and prevents breakage while repairing damage. Hair is left silky, hydrated and healthier than ever. For those with curly, coily or thick hair in need of intense moisture and strength.

name: Power Drops Color Preservation
description: A hair repair treatment that protects strands from UV rays and boosts color retention.

name: Power Drops Damage Repair
description: This highly concentrated treatment serum provides an intense dose of essential nutrients to rebuild and restore dry, damaged, time-weakened hair. Formulated with linoleic acid, biotin and sea kelp extract, just a few drops of this powerful elixir repairs and fortifies strands.

name: Power Drops Hydration
description: This highly concentrated treatment serum provides deep hydration and powerful protection against environmental pollution. Formulated with hyaluronic acid, creatine and moringa seed extract, just a few drops of this elixir delivers powerful protection and profound conditioning.

name: Priming Lotion Leave-In Conditioning Detangler
description: Ease your routine. This silky, leave-in conditioning lotion instantly detangles to ease combing and prevent breakage. Our ultra-hydrating formula, with cupuacu and mango seed butters, moisturize and smooth strands for healthy, beautiful curls that are prepped for styling. For those who need instant detangling and rich moisture. Curl types: 2-4.

name: Rough Luxury Molding Wax
description: Detailed styles get thoroughly modern texture with this flexible paste wax. Loved by layers for its volumizing hold that adds substantial softness, separation and semi-matte luster.

name: Rough Luxury Soft Molding Paste
description: An ultra-pliable molding paste that smoothly slips through hair before taking hold for definition, texture and shine. Lends a soft touch to short cuts and long layers alike.

name: Royal Blowout Heat Styling Spray
description: For the ultimate blowout. This sleekening mist smoothes even the worst-behaved tresses while speeding dry time. It also repairs split ends, nourishes, softens and strengthens the hair, giving it healthy body and shine.

name: Run Through Detangling Primer
description: Instant gratification: This lightweight conditioning detangler primes hair for immediate glide-through combing, leaving strands silky soft and incredibly touchable. Our cuticle-sealing formula protects hair from damage caused by heat styling and comb-resistant knots.

name: Run-Through Detangling Shampoo
description: The first step in your detangling routine, this softening shampoo adds slip and lightweight moisture while cleansing. When paired with your favorite Oribe conditioner, hair is left looking so glossy and healthy you’ll want to run your fingers through it. And now you can.

name: Serene Scalp Anti-Dandruff Shampoo
description: Do away with dandruff. This gentle treatment cleanser, formulated with salicylic acid, relieves and prevents dandruff while soothing a dry, itchy, irritated scalp. The result: healthy, hydrated hair with no trace of flakes.

name: Serene Scalp Balancing Conditioner
description: This calming conditioner balances it all, deeply hydrating and soothing the scalp while removing loose dandruff flakes. Our ultra-nourishing formula quenches parched strands and unwinds tangles, revealing softer, silkier hair.

name: Serene Scalp Densifying Conditioner
description: Developed in collaboration with a board-certified trichologist, our densifying conditioner for thinning hair is proven to increase hair fullness while weightlessly nourishing and detangling strands. Formulated with a bioactive blend of pea sprout extract, red clover extract and a biomimetic peptide, this conditioning milk stimulates the scalp, reduces shedding, and preserves hair integrity. Achieve thicker, healthier-looking hair over the course of three months.

name: Serene Scalp Densifying Shampoo
description: Developed in collaboration with a board-certified trichologist, our shampoo for thinning hair is proven to plump and densify strands for thicker, fuller, healthier-looking hair over the course of three months. Formulated with a bioactive blend of pea sprout extract, red clover extract and a biomimetic peptide, this gentle cleanser stimulates the scalp, reduces shedding, and preserves hair integrity.

name: Serene Scalp Densifying Treatment Spray
description: High-density at your fingertips. Our powerful treatment for thinning hair is proven to leave hair feeling thicker, fuller and healthier. The ultra-lightweight formula instantly plumps hair at the root while creating denser-looking strands over the course of three months.

name: Serene Scalp Exfoliating Scrub
description: Reveal the secret to a healthy scalp. This powerful scrub gently polishes scalp with exfoliating beads to remove oil, dirt and product buildup while a blend of alpha hydroxy acids and fruit extracts cleanses pores and nourishes hair. Scalp is left primed and deeply purified.

name: Serene Scalp Oil Control Powder Dry Shampoo
description: Extend time between washes and reset your scalp. Our ultra-absorbing, silkening dry shampoo powder mattifies the scalp and reduces excess sebum. A specialty starch blend and kaolin clay absorb oil, dirt and product buildup while mango leaf extract helps support a healthy scalp microbiome.

name: Serene Scalp Oil Control Shampoo
description: Extend the time (and serenity) between washes. This purifying shampoo gently cleanses, using a blend of green marine algae and a sugar-derived prebiotic to reduce and control oil while rebalancing scalp’s microbiome.

name: Serene Scalp Oil Control Treatment Mist
description: Prolong the pause between washes with this scalp-mattifying mist. Green marine algae and a sugar-derived prebiotic control sebum to balance and support a healthy scalp microbiome while protecting against environmental pollutants. Serenity achieved.

name: Serene Scalp Soothing Leave-On Treatment
description: Instant relief. This lightweight and fast-absorbing leave-on treatment removes loose dandruff flakes while cooling mint and calming chamomile soothe and balance the scalp.

name: Serene Scalp Thickening Treatment Spray
description: High-density at your fingertips. Our powerful treatment for thinning hair is proven to leave hair feeling thicker, fuller and healthier. The ultra-lightweight formula instantly plumps hair at the root while creating denser-looking strands over the course of three months.

name: Shampoo for Beautiful Color
description: An ultra-gentle cleanser for ultra-beautiful color. Extend the bright, happy life of your dye with high-tech ingredients that target damaged areas for intense moisture treatment and protect your hue from the elements.

name: Shampoo for Magnificent Volume
description: Because everyone needs a little largesse. Body-building polymers wash in truly uplifting volume and thickness, while rare botanical extracts leave hair full, lush, strong and easy to love.

name: Shampoo for Moisture & Control
description: Gently cleanse while adding hydration. Curly, coily hair gets instant moisture gratification, leaving it smooth, sleek and nourished. For those with thick or curly hair textures. Curl Types: 2-4.

name: Signature Conditioner
description: Oribe spared nothing in crafting this restorative daily moisturizer. Hydrating polymers revive youthful shine for lustrous, healthy locks and detangle for ease of combing throughout the day. Conditioner just got luxurious. Enjoy.

name: Signature Moisture Masque
description: A super-rich indulgence. This crème de la crème deep-hydrating masque transforms even the driest, most over-it hair, leaving it supremely soft and irresistibly touchable.

name: Signature Shampoo
description: Every morning should start with a little indulgence, such as this rich daily cleanser, custom-blended from the most exclusive ingredients to silken, detangle and protect. Prepare your hair for glamour.

name: Split End Seal Beautiful Color Treatment
description: Gone are the days of choosing between beautiful color and luxuriantly healthy hair. This serious silkening serum and split-end mender is clinically proven to restore, fortify, and preserve tresses of every shade.

name: Straight Away Smoothing Blowout Cream
description: This powerful perfecting cream protects against heat and humidity for super sleek strands that still have body and movement. Blowouts become quicker, more manageable and alluringly enduring. For those with curls who want straight, sleek strands. Curl Types: 2-4.

name: Styling Butter Curl Enhancing Crème
description: Style richly. This deeply nourishing crème instantly melts into hair and defines coily curls. A blend of shea butter and avocado oil hydrates hair to protect from breakage and control frizz. Strength, softness and hold are at your fingertips. For those who want to hydrate and define their curls and coils. Curl Types: 3-4.

name: Superfine Hair Spray
description: A sheer, modern hairspray with medium hold. Oribe designed Superfine to bring new technology to old-style glamour, resulting in flexible, shiny-soft control. The exclusive ultra-dry finish won't dampen or dull smooth styles.

name: Superfine Strong Hair Spray
description: Superfine’s super strong sibling takes hair spray to the next level, locking in must-hold styles with lustrous, natural shine.

name: Supershine Hydrating Conditioner
description: This illuminating conditioner imparts strands with multi-dimensional shine and intensely hydrates for hair that is soft, smooth, and beaming with brilliance. Now go dazzle them.

name: Supershine Hydrating Shampoo
description: Lather in luxury. This illuminating shampoo richly hydrates and smoothes, transforming dull strands into glossy locks. So brilliant.

name: Supershine Light Moisturizing Cream
description: A luxe reinvention of leave-in conditioner, this supreme cream satisfies the thirstiest hair, calming frizz, elevating shine and restoring hair to supernatural softness. Especially designed for fine-to-medium and extra-long hair.

name: Supershine Mirror Rinse Glass Hair Treatment
description: Shine your brightest. This deeply hydrating and illuminating glass hair treatment leaves strands silky soft and ultra-glossy. The weightless, conditioning essence smoothes the cuticle, creating vibrant reflective shine for a mirror-like finish. True brilliance awaits.

name: Supershine Moisturizing Cream
description: A luxe reinvention of leave-in conditioner, this supreme cream satisfies the thirstiest hair, calming frizz, elevating shine and restoring hair to supernatural softness. Especially designed for medium-to-thick and extra-long hair.

name: Swept Up Volume Powder Spray
description: Reach new heights. Our texturizing root-lift powder instantly adds buildable grip and style. The zero-mess sprayer creates amplified updos and dramatic volume.

name: The Cleanse Clarifying Shampoo
description: Go deep, purifying hair and scalp without stripping their essence. Volcanic ash powers this detoxifying mousse, which polishes away dirt, oil, and product buildup. Hair is restored, with a new inner glow.

name: Thick Dry Finishing Spray
description: Plump up the volume with this high-density finishing spray that inflates hair for extra thickness and lushness. Our secret for hair that is big, beautiful, beyond luxurious.

name: Très Set Structure Spray
description: Superfine’s super strong sibling takes hair spray to the next level, locking in must-hold styles with lustrous, natural shine.

name: Volumista Mist for Volume
description: Get hair higher with this weightless mane-plumping mist. New age polymers swell each hair shaft for incredible lushness, natural body and brilliant luster.
